body:
There is currently this tree:

```
diamine oxidase activity [EC:1.4.3.22 {source="skos:broadMatch"}]
   |__histamine oxidase activity [EC:1.4.3.22 {source="skos:broadMatch"}]
   |__putrescine oxidase activity [EC:1.4.3.10 {source="skos:exactMatch"}]
   |__protein-lysine 6-oxidase activity [EC:1.4.3.13 {source="skos:exactMatch"}]
```

EC:1.4.3.22 is:
Reaction catalysed: histamine + O2 + H2O = imidazole-4-acetaldehyde + H2O2 + NH4(+)
Comments: A group of enzymes that oxidize diamines, such as histamine, and also some primary monoamines but have little or no activity toward secondary and tertiary amines.

Also, protein-lysine 6-oxidase activity is not a 'diamine oxidase activity'.

So:
- [x] Remove  EC:1.4.3.22 {source="skos:broadMatch"} from 'histamine oxidase activity' and leave as broadMatch on parent 'diamine oxidase activity'
- [x] change parent of protein-lysine 6-oxidase activity to 'GO:0016641 oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-NH2 group of donors, oxygen as acceptor' (=EC:1.4.3.-)
title: GO:0052597 diamine oxidase activity terms
